title: Low Cali Friendly Portuguese Mincemeat Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly brunch dish featuring a tender and umami-flavored stir-fry using Portuguese mincemeat, designed for those watching their calorie intake.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add Portuguese mincemeat to the pan, stirring continuously for 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Fold in finely chopped red peppers, yellow peppers, and onion. Stir fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Pour in lemon juice and water or chicken stock. Let it come to a simmer.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Reduce heat if needed to maintain the sauce's consistency.
Stir-fry until all ingredients are tender and well combined, about 5-7 more minutes.
Serve hot as part of your brunch dish.
